nasb.text: They will no longer be a prey to the nations, and the beasts of the earth will not devour them; but they will live securely, and no one will make them afraid.

esv.text: They shall no more be a prey to the nations, nor shall the beasts of the land devour them. They shall dwell securely, and none shall make them afraid.

cnv.text: 他們必不再作列國的獵物，地上的野獸也不再吞吃他們；他們必安然居住，沒有人驚嚇他們。

ccb.text: 他们必不再成为列国的猎物，也不会被地上的野兽吞吃。他们必安居乐业，不再受人惊吓。
